name: Orb of Conquest
description: Notes Part of the Agents of Oryx Abilities.
effects: Beacon of Blight: On cursor location, constructs a beacon that damages and curses enemies in three bursts.Beacon Duration: 2 secondsFirst Explosion: Curse for 5 seconds and inflicts 600 damage within 5 squaresSecond Explosion: Curse for 5 seconds and inflicts 600 damage within 4 squaresThird Explosion: Curse for 5 seconds and inflicts 600 damage within 3 squaresConquerer’s Energy: ATT Boost (+10 ATT) on self for 5 seconds.Energy Cooldown: 15 seconds
